mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox (id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, type, payload, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId}, #{type}, #{payload}, NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT id, type, payload FROM outbox WHERE id=#{id} AND aggregate_type='following' AND type IN ('FollowCreated', 'FollowCanceled') LIMIT 1
SELECT id, type, payload FROM outbox WHERE id BETWEEN #{fromId} AND #{toId} AND aggregate_type='following' AND type IN ('FollowCreated', 'FollowCanceled') ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
